content: Hi, I'm Finley. I've been looking for a new book to read, something to relax with after work as a financial analyst at Goldman Sachs.
Hi Finley, it's nice to chat with you. As a financial analyst, you must have a lot of demanding work. What kind of books do you usually enjoy reading?
I like sci-fi novels, they're my escape. I've also been getting into home brewing beer and mountain biking, so maybe something related to those hobbies could be interesting.

Sci-fi is a great genre. Home brewing and mountain biking are fantastic hobbies. There are some excellent books about brewing and cycling that might interest you, or even sci-fi novels that incorporate elements of technology and innovation.
That sounds perfect. I've recently bought a house in Salt Lake City, UT, and I'm in the process of renovating it, so something to read during my downtime would be great.

Congratulations on the new house! Renovating can be a big project, but it's exciting. Salt Lake City is a beautiful area, especially for mountain biking. You might enjoy reading about local trails or outdoor adventures in Utah.
I'd love that. I've also been thinking about planning a surfing trip to California soon. Maybe a book about surfing or the California coast could get me excited for the trip.
A surfing trip sounds like a great way to relax. There are many wonderful books about surfing and the California coast that could get you in the right mindset for your trip.
I'm looking forward to it. My birthday is coming up on November 20th, and I think this trip could be a great way to celebrate.
Happy early birthday, Finley! A surfing trip in California will be an unforgettable way to celebrate. Make sure to check the surf forecasts and plan your trip accordingly.
It was great chatting with you, Finley. I hope you find a book that interests you and that your surfing trip and house renovation go well.
